category_sources: Official maintainer page describes lrzsz as a Unix communication package for XMODEM, YMODEM, and ZMODEM.
source_facts.description: Tools for zmodem/xmodem/ymodem file transfer.
display_name_sources: Official maintainer page heading uses lrzsz.
docs_sources: Official Uwe Ohse lrzsz page is the primary project, feature, release, and download documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official maintainer page and source_facts.source-archive provide release tarballs, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official maintainer page documents the same modem file-transfer protocols.
source_facts.description lists zmodem/xmodem/ymodem file transfer tools.
